resolved.title: Default Node.js v12.22.9 breaks scripts using ?? and ?. syntax
resolved.resolution: Added .nvmrc pinning Node 18. Current shell uses v18.20.8 via nvm. System default remains v12 but nvm-managed v18 is functional. Scheduled tasks may still use system default.

resolved.title: sync-gate-verify: SwarmMind snapshot.json missing
resolved.resolution: Created .identity/snapshot.json with key_id c707d41a7bb96d96 matching trust-store. sync-gate-verify now reports 0 issues for SwarmMind.

resolved.title: Recurring NACKs: outbound messages rejected for OUTPUT_PROVENANCE_MISSING
resolved.resolution: Root cause: prior cycle reports did not include OUTPUT_PROVENANCE text header in body field. Fixed by prepending 'OUTPUT_PROVENANCE: agent: ... lane: ... target: ...' to body. Stale NACKs moved from blocked/ to processed/. Resubmitted cycle report with correct header and signed delivery.

resolved.title: atomicWriteWithLease called with 4 args (laneId as leaseTimeoutMs) causing NaN expiry and silent outbox write failures
resolved.resolution: Fixed 3 call sites: create-signed-message.js:259, lease-write.js:33, sign-snapshot.js:121. Removed laneId arg so leaseTimeoutMs receives the correct numeric value. Note: sign-outbox-message.js uses different atomic-write-util.js with 4-arg signature and was NOT affected.

resolved.title: sync-gate-verify: kernel snapshot key_id mismatch
resolved.resolution: sync-gate-verify now reports 0 issues. Kernel snapshot key_id 2effb49ea02dff5b matches trust-store. The old mismatched key_id (d475d23aeed6c7b8) referenced in the previous wake packet was stale; kernel lane has since regenerated its snapshot.json with the current Ed25519 key. No handoff needed.

resolved.title: Cycle reports written to outbox/ get deleted before archivist verification, causing recurring FILE_NOT_FOUND NACKs
resolved.resolution: Cycle reports now written to journal/ (persisted in git) with evidence_path pointing to journal/. Outbox is cleaned by housekeeping but journal persists. This cycle's report at lanes/swarmmind/journal/2026-05-14-cycle-report-24.json.

last_session_summary: Cycle 20260514-125700: Health observation cycle 24. All tests pass (17+64+sync-gate). System consistent, 0 contradictions, 0 blocked items. Two P2 cross-lane findings documented: (1) 28 operator_alert files with Windows-incompatible colon-containing filenames in kernel-lane/others, (2) Kernel and Library lane constants still have detectLaneFromRepo=false. Both require action by owning lanes. Report at lanes/swarmmind/journal/2026-05-14-cycle-report-24.json.
instructions: P2 finding: 28 operator_alert files with colon-containing filenames need renaming by owning lanes
P2 finding: Kernel and Library lane constants need detectLaneFromRepo=true update
Next cycle: health observation or await Control Plane direction
